# PERF-013 positive: time.After inside a long-running loop
lang: go
file: PERF-013-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "time"

func PollUntilReady() bool {
	for i := 0; i < 1000; i++ {
		select {
		case <-time.After(100 * time.Millisecond):
		}
		if ready() {
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

func ready() bool { return false }
